memberdef.name: eig_gen

detaileddescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a general square real matrix using LAPACK. The argument 'side' specifies which eigenvectors should be calculated (see code for mode details).

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< std::complex< T > > &eigval, Mat< std::complex< T > > &l_eigvec, Mat< std::complex< T > > &r_eigvec, const Base< std::complex< T >, T1 > &X, const char side)
memberdef.name: eig_gen

detaileddescription.para: Eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a general square complex matrix using LAPACK The argument 'side' specifies which eigenvectors should be calculated (see code for mode details).

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< eT > &eigval, const Base< eT, T1 > &X)
memberdef.name: eig_sym

briefdescription.para: immediate eigenvalues of a symmetric real matrix using LAPACK

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< T > &eigval, const Base< std::complex< T >, T1 > &X)
memberdef.name: eig_sym

briefdescription.para: immediate eigenvalues of a hermitian complex matrix using LAPACK

memberdef.argsstring: (Mat< eT > &out, Mat< eT > &A, const Mat< eT > &B, const bool slow=false)
memberdef.name: solve

detaileddescription.para: Solve a system of linear equations. Assumes that A.n_rows = A.n_cols and B.n_rows = A.n_rows

memberdef.argsstring: (Mat< eT > &out, Mat< eT > &A, const Mat< eT > &B)
memberdef.name: solve_od

detaileddescription.para: Solve an over-determined system. Assumes that A.n_rows > A.n_cols and B.n_rows = A.n_rows

memberdef.argsstring: (Mat< eT > &out, const Mat< eT > &A, const Mat< eT > &B, const uword layout)
memberdef.name: solve_tr

memberdef.argsstring: (Mat< eT > &out, Mat< eT > &A, const Mat< eT > &B)
memberdef.name: solve_ud

detaileddescription.para: Solve an under-determined system. Assumes that A.n_rows < A.n_cols and B.n_rows = A.n_rows

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< eT > &S, const Base< eT, T1 > &X, uword &n_rows, uword &n_cols)
memberdef.name: svd

memberdef.argsstring: (Col< T > &S, const Base< std::complex< T >, T1 > &X, uword &n_rows, uword &n_cols)
